cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Multi-Org vs Single-Org Decision Framework'. Subtitle in white: 'Identity, Data, Process, Integration, Governance, Scale'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Business Operating Model' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'Regions', 'Brands', 'Legal Entities' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'Platform Architecture' vivid purple border — modules 'Single Org Core', 'Multi-Org Hub', 'Shared Services' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Enterprise Controls' vivid teal/green border — modules 'Identity', 'Data 360', 'MuleSoft APIs' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'Org Strategy Decision' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'ERP Integration' and 'Agentforce 2.0'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'Decision Path' → 'Assess Coupling' → 'Score Constraints' → 'Choose Org Model' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Single-Org, Multi-Org, Hybrid Tradeoffs'. Subtitle in white: 'How org boundaries affect data, identity, releases, and integrations'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Single Org' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'Shared Customer', 'Unified Security', 'One Release Train' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'Multi Org' vivid purple border — modules 'Regional Isolation', 'Local Releases', 'Separate Data Ownership' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Hybrid Hub-and-Spoke' vivid teal/green border — modules 'Central Identity', 'Data 360 Federation', 'MuleSoft APIs' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'Org Boundary Decision' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'ERP' and 'Agentforce 2.0'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'Evaluate' → 'Score Coupling' → 'Design Boundaries' → 'Govern Contracts' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Org Strategy Scoring Model'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Org Strategy Scoring Model'. Subtitle 'Turn political org debates into weighted architecture tradeoffs'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Business Coupling with shared Account and Opportunity icons', 'Separation Pressure with legal entity shield icon', 'Operating Model with release train icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD DECISION STYLE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD DECISION STYLE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: if (regionDisagrees) { createNewOrg(); } else { useSingleOrg(); } right column green border '// GOOD' code: Integer singleOrgScore = sharedCustomerScore * 3 + sharedProcessScore * 3; Integer multiOrgScore = dataResidencyScore * 3 + releaseAutonomyScore * 2; String model = Math.abs(singleOrgScore - multiOrgScore) < 8 ? 'Hybrid' : 'Decide'; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Score coupling', 'Score separation', 'Document tradeoffs'. Footer bar: 'Org boundaries are consequences of architecture decisions'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
